gates.sync_smoke: pass — 3/4 repos got non-null description_en; mateushr-portfolio correctly null (monolingual README)

behavioral_checks.case: ## English immediately followed by another heading

notes.parser_version_location: local const inside computeSourceHash (sync.ts:36); appended via `|v${PARSER_VERSION}` at end of joined payload (sync.ts:44). Not reassigned anywhere.
notes.parse_english_description_flow: Primary path captures paragraph between `## English` and next `/^#{1,6}\s/` heading or blank line; returns early via joinParagraph when non-empty. Fallback (legacy `### <ProjectName>` scan, bounded to 8 lines) runs only when primary yields nothing. No double-return, no unreachable code.
notes.join_paragraph_shared: joinParagraph is the single truth for length cap (500) + whitespace collapse; called from both parseDescription (PT) and parseEnglishDescription (EN primary + fallback).

regression_guard.external_dependency_on_hash_format: none — hash is opaque to consumers; format bump is safe
